title: Wow I May Have Just Realized the Largest Plothole Ever
display_title: Wow I May Have Just Realized the Largest Plothole Ever
wikitext:
[]: Wow, I May Have Just Realized the Largest Plothole Ever             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 24, 2007 4:37 pm If my reasoning is correct, NGE has a plothole of enormous magnitude. Larger than the amnesiac Kaworu concept, even. I'm talking Battlefield Earth -level plothole. Please, somebody explain to me how this is possible and not the biggest oversight in anime history. As we know, Adam was impaled with her own Spear of Longinus. We know that even without the CI, as was discussed in another thread (though I don't remember where): she must have been, because if it had been with Lilith's spear, it would be a Lilim-type organism combining with an Adam-type organism and Instrumentality would have been initiated. That's why Adam's Spear had to impale its own Seed, and why the same Spear could initiate Third Impact in EoE when combining with Unit 01, who was made from Lilith. ...Okay. All of that seemed reasonable to me, UNTIL a few minutes ago, when I realized: That same Spear was inside Lilith through much of the series. That Spear is Adam-type, and thus sticking it inside Lilith should have caused 3I, right? If we are to assume that a Spear combining with an opposing seed would not cause Instrumentality, and the only reason Adam's Spear impaled her is because Lilith's was already missing and it was operating under the assumption that the two Seeds would inevitably one day come into contact (or their offspring would), then EoE doesn't make sense because the Spear shouldn't have formed the Tree of Life when combining with Unit 01. Okay, guys. Is there any way out of this one? :(

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 24, 2007 4:43 pm NAveryW wrote: with Lilith's spear, it would be a Lilim-type organism combining with an Adam-type organism and Instrumentality would have been initiated.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Dec 24, 2007 5:03 pm yeah, Spears are just Spears they aren't Adam or Lilith-type. And simply having Spear + Seed of Life isn't enough. They did use the Spear to cause Second Impact with Adam....in *combination* with an experiment they were doing....something like shooting Adam with human DNA or something.... ....the point is the Spear can have more than one "mode". Simply stabbing a Seed with a Spear makes it go dormant, but they had to "do something" to the Spear to make it cause Second Impact with Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 24, 2007 5:21 pm I thought that what happened with Adam that caused 2I was the "gene diving". It's obvious if you listen that a human (Lilim) making contact with Adam was one of the primary causes of 2I. The main problem I see with the Spear not being a "type" is that (from what I can tell) EoE wouldn't be possible otherwise, because that's how the Tree of Life was formed. It does seem that somewhere in here is the answer, but I can't quite find it...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 24, 2007 5:34 pm Conversation me and zuggy had about this topic in the channel, it may or may not be helpful #egf wrote: (16:40:38) zuggy: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4160 (16:40:48) Ornette: reading that right now (16:42:31) zuggy: there difference there is lilith's soul is elsewhere in Rei (16:42:57) Ornette: Seele was going to initiate instrumentality without Lilith altogether (16:44:16) zuggy: i thought they had to use eva 01 (16:44:21) Ornette: yeah (16:44:31) Ornette: but that didn't have Rei's soul in it (16:44:33) zuggy: because that's the only eva that's from lilith and can be made into an ark (16:45:30) zuggy: navery is talking about the spear having no effect on lilith, but maybe the spear doesn't have any effect if there is no resident soul i.e. lilith is elsewhere in Rei (16:45:52) Ornette: ahh (16:46:05) Ornette: it seemed to have the same effect that it had with Adam (16:46:30) zuggy: mmmm (16:46:47) Ornette: I don't see why we need to bring souls into it (16:47:01) Ornette: I'm not sure where he's getting that there are multiple types of spears from (16:48:25) zuggy: when the spear goes into eva 01 in eoe kozo says it has both the fruit of life and knowledge, which means by getting the spear it has obtained either something from lilith or adam (16:49:48) zuggy: so i assume that's similar to the forbidden union of adam and lilith stuff (16:50:12) Ornette: possibly, but what? Eva-01 already had an S2 (16:51:40) zuggy: then the spear must contain the fruit of knowledge, which is... you know! what the lilim posses (16:52:59) zuggy: i think there's been a few thread on this before (16:53:04) zuggy: *threads (16:53:13) Ornette: but then wouldn't that make it Lilith's spear if there are types? (16:53:50) zuggy: yes, but then you have to ask why eva 01 didn't already have the fruit of knowledge being borne from lilith (16:54:52) Ornette: maybe it was just acting as a bridge (16:55:08) Ornette: since bring born of lilith and having an S2 didn't cause anything to happen (16:55:20) Ornette: but I still don't see why that means there are 2 types of spears (16:56:35) zuggy: if what you said there is correct, that it's a bridge, then there isn't 2 types of bridge. i think this stems from kozo's line in EoE where he says after eva 01 is poked with the spear that it now has both the fol/fok (16:56:45) zuggy: *2 types of spear (16:57:37) Ornette: why does there have to be 2 types? (16:57:50) Ornette: seeing as how it had the same effect on both seeds? (16:59:07) zuggy: because if you assume kozo is talking about spear when he says Eva 01 has both fruits you would assume that spear is one of those fruits, which would mean it's from one of the Seeds (16:59:20) Ornette: I don't think he's talking about the spear there (16:59:35) Ornette: BB's translation: "Having obtained them both, EVA-01 has become like a God. (16:59:35) Ornette: And now it has been restored to the propagule of souls... the Tree of Life." (16:59:44) Ornette: Eva-01 already had both fruits (16:59:58) Ornette: and now (with the spear) it has been restored to the tree of life (17:00:27) zuggy: explain that to navery then, 'cause i think that's where the different types of spear thing comes from, that line (17:01:06) Ornette: I've asked him to explain why he thinks there are 2 types of spears (17:01:23) Ornette: maybe it's something different (17:02:04) zuggy: *refreshs page* oh, you have! (17:02:30) Ornette: The whole EoE bit is what follows the assumption that there are 2 types of spears (17:03:01) Ornette: I'm not questioning the induction, but the premise (17:04:20) zuggy: V has brought up the point of 2nd Impact (17:04:32) Ornette: it makes sense (17:04:40) Ornette: there was DNA injected into Adam (17:04:49) Ornette: they found the spear with Adam to begin with (17:05:16) zuggy: so that's both fruits with the "bridge" (17:05:30) Ornette: yeah (17:05:42) zuggy: but don't the Angels have a similar genome, like dna? (17:05:43) Ornette: the "bridge" thing I just made up (17:05:54) Ornette: I don't know if you can call it genome (17:06:04) zuggy: well it sounds good enough to me (17:06:05) Ornette: it was a pattern (17:06:12) zuggy: about the bridge i mean (17:06:17) Ornette: ahh (17:06:29) Ornette: yeah, something I just threw out there as a "well, this makes sense too" (17:07:26) Ornette: I didn't really put that much thought into, there could be holes in it

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Dec 24, 2007 6:06 pm V wrote: They did use the Spear to cause Second Impact with Adam....

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 24, 2007 7:29 pm OOHHHHH, okay! Thanks for that, Ornette! :o Now it makes sense! The Spear could stick inside Lilith just fine because her soul was elsewhere !

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 24, 2007 7:48 pm Well, I still don't understand why there has to be 2 types of Spears.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Dec 24, 2007 9:22 pm NAveryW wrote: The Spear could stick inside Lilith just fine because her soul was elsewhere !

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Dec 24, 2007 10:39 pm That's not exactly a plothole as much as it is something that they didn't bother to explain. (Overall, it's not really important to the story how they manage to harvest souls as long as they can. It's like having FTL travel in sci-fi space stories.)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Dec 24, 2007 11:01 pm NAveryW wrote: That's not exactly a plothole as much as it is something that they didn't bother to explain.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 25, 2007 12:51 am It's impossible to tell what Kaworu and the Monoliths are actually talking about. And the whole Fruit of Life/Fruit of Knowledge thing is pure junk...even if she were born from Lilith, Sho's design screams Adam. The idea that Lilith doesn't have an S2 doesn't seem to be right. How else could she bleed like that without dying? The Evas themselves have an S2-like organ somewhere, how else could they go berserk without a power source? As a matter of fact, the S2 organ might be useful for absurd power levels like those instrumentality demands. If Lilith or the Evas have non-S2 power sources that provide tremendous (But sub-S2 level) energy, can be very hard to activate (In case of Evas) and are impossible to detect, that would seriously explain a lot. And if the Dead Sea Scrolls and Spear are anything, it's best to prepare for contingencies. Jimbo, Lilith does say "Okaeri Nasai" to Rei in EoE, so she might have a little bit of soul left to hold her together. (Maybe having a shortage of soul explains why her flesh is so marshmallowy?)

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 25, 2007 12:52 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: NAveryW wrote: The Spear could stick inside Lilith just fine because her soul was elsewhere !

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Dec 25, 2007 1:07 am He's powerless without his head!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 25, 2007 1:11 am THERE CAN BE ONLY ONE!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 25, 2007 1:20 am You are the only one! Ahem, what was this thread about again? Kaworu thinking Lilith was Adam...that's a goof essentially every Angel except Gaghiel made.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Dec 25, 2007 4:47 am UrsusArctos wrote: It's impossible to tell what Kaworu and the Monoliths are actually talking about.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 25, 2007 5:05 am Soul juice? Nein. If the Evas and Lilith had a hypothetical organ that is less powerful than the real S2, and undetectable to Nerv's current technology, wouldn't that make so much more sense? It's a pure hypothesis, but how do you explain Lilith bleeding several hundred times her own body volume or regenerating otherwise? Lilith isn't an Eva, and you consider Lilith 100% desouled at the time we see her. Of course, this is just a theory. There's nothing we know of that powers those boso Evas, so perhaps I shouldn't mention it here...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Dec 25, 2007 5:31 am UrsusArctos wrote: If the Evas and Lilith had a hypothetical organ that is less powerful than the real S2, and undetectable to Nerv's current technology, wouldn't that make so much more sense?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Dec 25, 2007 7:42 am Wow Yet another one to add to the pile. I'd thought eva had run out of plotholes at this point but your right.
